headline: Textron Inc. (TXT) Strengthens Aerospace Prospects with New Service Facility in Australia
summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is an undervalued aerospace and defense stock to buy. On May 5, Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT)’s unit, Textron Aviation, opened a new service facility at Essendon Fields Airport in Melbourne, one of the most established aviation hubs. The facility will expand factory-direct support for Cessna, Beechcraft, and Hawker customers across Australia and […]
